caption: A man with dark skin and glasses is recording a podcast in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing on racks. He wears a distinctive, tall, grey wig, a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, and a brown bow tie, while wearing black headphones over his ears. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. On-screen graphics display the text "OSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his hands, shifting his facial expressions and slight head movements while remaining seated in the same position. The background remains static, showing several framed pictures on the wall and a "LEE" branded garment hanging behind him.
